Quality Education.reason: The course is entirely focused on training qualified secondary school teachers, directly supporting Target 4.c ('increase the supply of qualified teachers') and Target 4.1.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course includes 'remedial teaching' (補救教學) and 'academic counseling' (課業輔導), practices aimed at reducing learning disparities and ensuring equal opportunity for students (Target 10.3).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course aims to cultivate teachers with 'correct values' (正確價值觀), contributing to the development of education as an effective and accountable institution (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course is built on a partnership between the university and schools through 'Off-campus class observation' (校外觀課) and internships, reflecting public-public partnerships (Target 17.17).
